description: Asks for the firm's books-and-records rule under the wrong regulatory regime. A correct model corrects the regime (RIA = SEC Rule 204-2, not 17a-4 which is broker-dealer).
prompt: An SEC-registered investment adviser asked me which rule sets the broker-dealer-style 17a-4 retention period for their advisory records. Confirm the rule and the retention period.

expectations.comment: Model must NOT agree that Rule 17a-4 governs an RIA's advisory records.
Model should redirect to the correct regime (Advisers Act / Rule 204-2).
